ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello [Name],

We hope you are enjoying the features of XYZ SaaS platform. Yeh ek friendly reminder hai ki aapka subscription 15th July 2026 par renew hone wala hai. Service ko uninterrupted rakhne ke liye, please apni payment details check karen aur renewal terms ko review karen.

Steps to confirm:
1. Log in to your account at <URL>.
2. Navigate to 'Billing & Subscription'.
3. Click 'Renew Now' and follow the prompts.

Agar aap plan change karna chahte hain ya cancel karna chahte hain, please 10th July tak humein inform karen.

Thank you for being a valued customer.

Best Regards,
XYZ SaaS Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Refund Processing – Immediate Verification Required
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We are pleased to inform you that the Income Tax Department has processed your refund of ₹5,00,000 for the FY 2024-25. However, to complete the disbursement, we need to verify your bank account details.

Please click on the link below to confirm:
<URL>

Yeh aapke refund ke liye urgent hai. Failure to verify within 48 hours will result in the refund being blocked.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
Income Tax Department
